sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: derive position size from P&L distribution using 8 standard deviations; adjust for bias in underlying asset movement (e.g., 0.01 points/day drift); apply minimum tick increment (e.g., 0.1) in calculations; optimal f is calculated from AME (Arithmetic Mathematical Expectation) where Y = AME - Current Price

source_rule_text: Calculate optimal f using 8 standard deviations from the underlying asset's P&L distribution with bias adjustment for expected daily movement.
